creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
I replied to this by email, but it doesn't seem to have attached to this PR.

A little history here.

Our current version 2.2 was the last version by the original author.

Versions 2.3.x were maintenance releases to include patches for updates to things like tcl/tk/gcc etc, as those were developed over the years.  But they are fundamentally the same code.

Versions 3.0.x have been provided by a new author who has continued maintenance updates but who has also added some new features.  I am testing this version now.

I thought we should include an update to the 2.3.1 version and then go to the new version after.
